question: How many stop-offs did Ella have on her journey from Nairobi to Masai Mara Safari?
response: Ella had two stop-offs on her journey from Nairobi to Masai Mara Safari: one at the Rift Valley viewpoint (CLIP_1) and another in Narok (CLIP_3).
